ogTitle: Enoggera Reservoir vs Erakala: Climate Safety

heading: Enoggera Reservoir vs Erakala — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Enoggera Reservoir, Queensland and Erakala, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Erakala has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Enoggera Reservoir (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Enoggera Reservoir or Erakala safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Enoggera Reservoir has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Erakala scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Enoggera Reservoir scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Erakala scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Enoggera Reservoir or Erakala?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Erakala has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
